stemHtml: How are fuel flow and TAS connected to each other in horizontal flight?

options.a: An increase in TAS will lead to a decrease in fuel flow up to the maximum endurance speed and increase thereafter.
options.b: TAS and fuel flow are independent of one another, so the fuel flow is unaffected by any change in TAS.
options.c: An increase in TAS will lead to an increase in the fuel flow.
options.d: An increase in TAS will lead to an increase in the fuel flow up to the maximum endurance speed and decrease thereafter.
